title: rubus chloracanthus
intro: Rubus chloracanthus, also known as the yellow bramble or yellow Himalayan raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus chloracanthus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of health conditions.
